query:
SELECT 
  ie.id,
  ie.nome,
  ie.telefone,
  e.titulo as eventoTitulo
FROM inscricoesEventos ie
INNER JOIN eventos e ON ie.eventoId = e.id
ORDER BY ie.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:

  e.titulo as eventoTitulo

INNER JOIN eventos e ON ie.eventoId = e.id
